title: tephroseris helenitis subsp. arvernensis
intro: Tephroseris helenitis subsp. arvernensis, also known as Alpine Hawk's Beard, is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Tephroseris helenitis subsp. arvernensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing irritated skin and mucous membranes. Alpine Hawk's Beard can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
